parameters.query:
SELECT jsonb_build_object('accounts', COALESCE((SELECT jsonb_agg(x.acct) FROM (
  SELECT jsonb_build_object(
    'account', a.name,
    'already_flagged', (SELECT jsonb_agg(s.summary) FROM signals s
                        WHERE s.account_id = a.id AND s.type = 'risk' AND s.created_at > now() - interval '14 days'),
    'calls', (SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object('title', c.title, 'date', c.call_date::date, 'transcript', left(c.transcript, 2500)))
              FROM (SELECT * FROM calls c2 WHERE c2.account_id = a.id AND c2.call_date > now() - interval '7 days'
                    AND c2.transcript IS NOT NULL AND c2.transcript <> '' ORDER BY c2.call_date DESC LIMIT 2) c)
  ) AS acct
  FROM accounts a
  JOIN LATERAL (SELECT max(c3.call_date) AS mx FROM calls c3 WHERE c3.account_id = a.id) m ON true
  WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM calls c4 WHERE c4.account_id = a.id AND c4.call_date > now() - interval '7 days'
                AND c4.transcript IS NOT NULL AND c4.transcript <> '')
  ORDER BY m.mx DESC LIMIT 5
) x), '[]'::jsonb)) AS ctx;

parameters.content:
## Early radar - potential risks BEFORE they're risks
Mondays 07:55 (+ manual): ONE model call over tight transcript excerpts (up to 5 accounts x 2 calls x 2.5k chars - the same request size as the brief and stories, which the current Azure quota handles). Excludes already-flagged risks; max 5 items with verbatim evidence quotes; empty when nothing genuine.
Stored in `briefs` (audience='radar').

If even this 429s, wait 2 minutes after running workflows 13/15 (they share the quota) - and ask DevOps to raise the gpt-4o-mini deployment's TPM, which removes the constraint entirely.
